prompt: Ultra-realistic documentary-style portrait of a US Air Force F-15 Eagle pilot in full flight gear, standing on the tarmac next to their aircraft. Harsh midday desert sunlight creating dramatic shadows on the pilot's face and flight suit. Visible details: weathered skin, slight stubble, minor imperfections, sweat marks on the flight suit from the heat. No beautification filters. Do not alter facial features. Photorealistic, unretouched, documentary quality.
